stemHtml: Which of the following statements about boundary layers is correct?

options.a: The turbulent boundary layer will separate more easily than the laminar boundary layer.
options.b: The turbulent boundary layer has more kinetic energy than the laminar boundary layer.
options.c: The turbulent boundary layer is thinner than the laminar boundary layer.
options.d: The turbulent boundary layer gives a lower skin friction than the laminar boundary layer.
